state_updates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Welcome to Field Service Scheduling!

I'll help you schedule a service appointment and assign the right technician.

Please provide:
- Customer name
- Type of service needed
- Preferred date and time
- Service priority (if urgent)

This helps me find the best available technician for your needs.
